name: Steganography Hide Files with Steghide
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Pawel Mazur
SIGMA Title: Steganography Hide Files with Steghide
SIGMA Description: Detects embedding of files with usage of steghide binary, the adversaries may use this technique to prevent the detection of hidden information.

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%steghide%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%embed%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-cf%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-ef%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%-cf%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-ef%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Steganography Hide Files with Steghide on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%execve%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a0%steghide%' AND LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a1%embed%' AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a2%-cf%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-ef%') AND (LOWER(Command) LIKE '%a4%-cf%' OR LOWER(Command) LIKE '%-ef%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Steganography Hide Files with Steghide
